Interface IEdgeSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a network edge source.

[Guid("5B36D2C6-20D2-405C-8616-731BA7EE68A5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IEdgeSource : IUtilityNetworkSource, INetworkSource
